summary: Reposted One America News interview segment from 'Real America with Dan Ball.' A split-screen shows the host at a desk at left and a remote guest in a dark suit and glasses at right, both against Washington skyline backdrops. An OAN lower-third reads 'DHS AGENCY TO HIRE 200 SPECIAL AGENTS TO COMBAT IMMIGRATION FRAUD.' The audio is the guest describing a requirement that immigrants show they can support themselves.

script.scene: Split-screen OAN interview, host at left and guest in glasses at right; chyron 'DHS AGENCY TO HIRE 200 SPECIAL AGENTS TO COMBAT IMMIGRATION FRAUD.'
